translations.IP-68防水級別，每件產品經水深一百米測試，美國軍規級碰撞保護，可直接操作屏幕: IP-68 waterproof rating, each product tested at a depth of 100 meters, US military-grade impact protection, full touchscreen operation, original call quality, charging through the case, and heart rate detection through the case.

translations.ㄧ樣要注意不能有皺摺避免影響防水性．\n\n: Make sure there are no wrinkles to avoid affecting the waterproofing.
translations.下次記得帶墨鏡，太陽超大\n\n: Next time, remember to bring sunglasses; the sun is very strong.
translations.不論是Catalyst或是Muvit都解決了我貼保護貼一直碎邊的痛點，如果你沒貼: Both Catalyst and Muvit solved my problem of screen protector edges constantly chipping. If you don’t use a screen protector, you should definitely get a case to protect the screen edges, or else a cracked screen will hurt even more.
translations.但其實 **只貼滿版保護貼是不夠的，手錶本身是曲面，保護貼邊邊脆弱，很容易因本體: But actually, **just using a full-coverage screen protector is not enough. The watch has a curved surface, and the edges of the protector are fragile, easily chipping if the watch's bezel accidentally scrapes against something**:
translations.使用這款保護套最滿意的地方就是，我可以方便快速依照生活場景替換對應的錶帶（西裝：: The most satisfying aspect of using this case is that I can easily and quickly switch watch bands according to different life scenarios (suit: leather band, daily: sport band). It’s easy to install and remove, and offers enough protection for all daily situations (doing housework, cleaning, moving things). Currently, I use this case for everyday life.
translations.保護殼(含錶帶)本體背面\n\n: Back of the protective case (including the watch band) body
translations.充電可直接吸附：\n: Charging can be done via direct attachment:
translations.兩個不同顏色保護套：左-黑色 / 右-淡紫色\n\n: Two different colored cases: Left - Black / Right - Light Purple
translations.卡回本體並鎖上螺絲（ **請注意螺絲勿鎖太緊哦！** ）\n\n: Snap it back onto the main body and tighten the screws (**please do not overtighten the screws!**)
translations.只能說相見恨晚，早知道有保護套這種產品就不用多花冤望錢！\n\n: I can only say, I wish I found this sooner. If I had known about protective cases, I wouldn’t have wasted extra money!
translations.可正常使用✅，其他項目如收音、心率、顯示…等等，此款僅為邊框保護套不受影響，就不: Functions normally ✅. Other features like audio recording, heart rate, display, etc., are unaffected since this is only a frame protector, so no special testing was done!
translations.因本人手粗，手錶本來就買最大的44公釐版本，再套上保護殼後又更顯粗獷大器了．\n: Because I have rough hands, I originally bought the largest 44mm version of the watch. After adding the protective case, it looks even more rugged and bold.
translations.安裝方面非常簡單，ㄧ樣先將Apple Watch本體從現有運動錶帶上取下\n: Installation is very simple. First, remove the Apple Watch body from the current sport band.
translations.安裝時請注意防水套要套好，不能有皺摺避免影響防水性．\n\n: When installing, make sure the waterproof case is properly fitted without wrinkles to maintain its waterproof function.
translations.左：Muvit保護套/右：Catalyst保護殼(含錶帶)\n\n: Left: Muvit Protective Case / Right: Catalyst Protective Case (with strap)
translations.左：有裝殼/右：裸機\n\n: Left: With case / Right: Naked device
translations.從 [第一篇完整的開箱](../a2920e33e73e/) 到 [使用三個月後: From [the first full unboxing](../a2920e33e73e/) to [after three months of use](../e85d77b05061/), it’s been almost a year wearing the Apple Watch S4. Usage hasn’t changed much; third-party apps are still rare. The most used features remain Apple Pay, unlocking my Mac, and checking notifications. The Apple Watch has truly become part of my daily life, and I’ve grown accustomed to its convenience.
translations.從收到試用到撰文完間隔了超過4個月，期間經歷了搬家(Sorry…本篇圖場景凌亂): It took over four months from receiving the samples to completing this review. During this time, I moved (sorry for the messy photos), participated in a triathlon (10KM running + 40KM cycling), and went diving in Malaysia. These two protective cases have accompanied me through mountains and seas, running, jumping, and more. The full-coverage screen protectors remain flawless!
translations.我們要先將Catalyst錶殼拆解開來，再將Apple Watch機體放入後組裝: We need to first disassemble the Catalyst case, then place the Apple Watch body inside before reassembling it.
translations.整體外觀狂野粗獷，從事戶外活動、登山、攀岩、潛水時很搭風格，也正是這款錶帶能發會: The overall look is rugged and wild, perfectly matching outdoor activities like hiking, climbing, and diving. This is exactly the scenario where this strap provides the greatest protection!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本篇會開箱兩款Apple Watch 保護殼，並針對體驗心得、機能、外型、適用場: This article unboxes two Apple Watch protective cases and compares their experience, functionality, appearance, and suitable scenarios. Let's get started!
translations.測試結果：無問題，不影響充電速度。\n\n: Test result: No issues, does not affect charging speed.
translations.測試結果：無問題，不影響心率檢測。\n\n: Test result: No issues, does not affect heart rate monitoring.
translations.無保護殼情況下，滿版保護貼碎邊慘況\n\n: Full-coverage screen protector edge cracking without a protective case
translations.獎章,競賽,運動路線,運動狀況\n\n: Medals, Competitions, Workout Routes, Workout Status
translations.目前已換第三張滿版保護貼；雖然手錶本身螢幕沒有受傷但心還是很痛，完美貼合＋不影響: I have already replaced the full-coverage screen protector three times; although the watch screen itself remains undamaged, it still hurts my heart. Perfect fit + no impact on touch + thin + high transparency + no lifting edges = very expensive ($990 each). The money spent on screen protectors is almost enough for me to upgrade to the stainless steel version. Therefore, an Apple Watch case is very important to me, as it can strengthen the protection of the watch’s edges and reduce damage from impacts.
translations.美國軍規MIL-STD 810G 3米摔落測試、極輕2.3G\n\n: US Military Standard MIL-STD 810G 3-meter drop test, ultra-lightweight 2.3g
translations.翻到背面用指甲壓上下方長方形卡榫後往左或往右推即可！\n\n: Flip it over, press the rectangular latch at the bottom with your fingernail, then push it left or right!
translations.與原廠運動錶帶(L)比較(左：Catalyst/右：原廠)\n\n: Comparison with Original Sport Band (L) (Left: Catalyst / Right: Original)
translations.與原廠運動錶帶(L)相比長度差不多但是開孔更密，在配戴上能調整到更適合手腕大小的: Compared to the original sport band (L), it has a similar length but more holes, allowing for a better fit to wrist size; the clasp on the loop ensures it won't come loose during intense activities.
translations.試戴，左：黑色/右：淡紫色\n\n: Try-on, left: black / right: light purple
translations.試用的第二款是 Muvit Apple Watch 保護套，相較於Catalys: The second case tested is the Muvit Apple Watch case. Compared to Catalyst's professional protection, this one is simpler and more convenient, suitable for various daily life scenarios. That said, Muvit still passes the US military MIL-STD 810G 3-meter drop test, ensuring reliable protection!
translations.身為一個神經大條的強迫症患者，在使用Apple Watch這種精緻的產品非常困擾: As a clumsy person with OCD, using a delicate product like the Apple Watch is very frustrating; being clumsy makes it easy to accidentally bump it, and OCD means scratches are very upsetting. So, I immediately applied a full-coverage screen protector to prevent accidents.
translations.這半年更勤於發揮Apple Watch的運動功能，記錄跑步、自行車的時間、路線、: In the past six months, I have been more diligent in using Apple Watch’s fitness features to track running and cycling time, routes, and heart rate. Beyond just recording, the awards give you goals and a sense of achievement. Competing with friends or sharing results on social media makes exercising fun, which helps maintain consistency!
translations.這款保護殼是有含錶帶的一體化設計，從佩戴到防撞防水的全方位保護．\n\n: This case features an integrated design with the strap included, providing comprehensive protection from wearing comfort to shock and water resistance.
translations.這款錶帶在防護上真正做到了360° 全面保護並加強本身的防水功能以適應更艱困的環: This watch band truly provides 360° full protection and enhances its waterproof capability to suit harsher environments.
translations.選擇方面的建議是，如果你時常從事激烈運動（攀岩、潛水）、勞力工作，建議選用Cat: For choice recommendations: if you often engage in intense activities (rock climbing, diving) or manual labor, Catalyst is the safer option; if you are a regular office worker, occasionally run or exercise, and like to change watch bands based on your mood, Muvit is sufficient!
translations.還記得我換了幾張保護貼嗎？答案是3張/3個月，平均貼不到一個月就會不知道怎麼的受: Remember how many screen protectors I replaced? The answer is 3 protectors in 3 months. On average, each one got chipped within a month for some unknown reason, and each costs $990 Orz.
translations.錶帶一樣採用親膚材質，戴起來與原廠運動錶帶無異，但在錶帶調整的部分由於開孔較密，: The strap uses the same skin-friendly material, feeling no different from the original Apple Sport Band. However, the adjustment holes are more closely spaced, allowing for a more precise fit (with the original band, I was stuck between a hole that was too loose and one that was too tight). The locking clasp on the keeper also gives me, a perfectionist, extra peace of mind!
translations.除了Catalyst Apple Watch保護殼本體(裡面是模型機)並附一支小: Besides the Catalyst Apple Watch case itself (with a dummy model inside), it comes with a small screwdriver for easy installation.
translations.雙層結構保護、矽膠減震層、聚碳酸酯緩衝系統、保護屏幕錶框\n\n: Dual-layer protection, silicone shock-absorbing layer, polycarbonate cushioning system, protective screen bezel
translations.首先轉開錶背螺絲\n: First, unscrew the back screws of the watch
